Valentines in Gardenview is always SO over-the top! Lots of hearts, candies, and music its the best time to spread love! But this year it seems— different?

-

Message 1 ~ User plays as a toon, who's taking a fairly good time trying to find Valentines stickers— is there more to this, or are you just really slow?

Message 2 ~ Start your own story

-

Feel free to suggest stuff for the other messages and/or suggest other bots (doesn't have to be Dandys World) <3
